violations.text: Salad was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed item in 2 door fridge for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Inspector observed a handwashing sink in the kitchen area lacking proper hand washing signage. A sign or poster that notifies food employees to wash their hands shall be provided at all handwashing sinks used by food employees and shall be clearly visible to food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the steam tables were observed with original new equipment wrapping. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Cold food items were observed delivered between 47-51 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC placed in milk cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (glass platter and spatula) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Establishment does not have sanitizer for the 3 bay sink. Per interview with PIC, dishes and utensils are sent to the mother kitchen to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and sanitizing spray. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the steam tables were observed with original new equipment wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Establishment is lacking handwashing signage for sink in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
Facility is lacking hot water for hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The (walls ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed holes in wall at piping for 3 bay sink and handwashing sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

The walls behind 3 bay sink are constructed of painted cement. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

Ambient temperature of the reach-in was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was removed and placed in milk cooler at the time of inspection. Per PIC food will not be held in the unit until it can be serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
Hot water not available in the 3-Bay sink at the time of inspection. All utensils must be returned to the commissary kitchen for ware washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023

The walls in the kitchen behind the 3-bay sink and service area are constructed of painted cement. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Handsink not present at service line. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage cabinets in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
